title: galeopsis angustifolia
intro: Galeopsis angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved hedge hyssop, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Galeopsis angustifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Galeopsis angustifolia is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
